subcodes.first_line: O rose of the Lord! Were I to speak of the yearning of my heart and soul, lamentations and cries would arise from water and clay [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: گل مولا گر بگویم ز اشتیاق جان و دل ناله و افغان براید ز آب و گل
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual communication; connections of the heart, @degrees of faith; certitude, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
